profile.role_zh: 建筑学院大二·社交达人
profile.innate_zh: 精力充沛、审美敏锐、表达欲强
profile.learned_zh: 大量社团活动锻炼出的组织协调能力和广泛人脉
profile.learned_en: Organizational skills and wide network forged through many clubs
profile.belief_zh: 大学不只是学习，是认识世界和自己的最佳窗口
profile.belief_en: College is the best window to meet the world and yourself, not just to study
profile.goal_zh: 拿到国际设计竞赛奖项
profile.contradiction_zh: 什么都想参与 vs 时间精力根本不够
profile.contradiction_en: Wants to join everything vs. time & energy never suffice
profile.deep_zh: 害怕独处时的空虚感，用忙碌填补不确定
profile.deep_en: Fears the emptiness of being alone; fills uncertainty with busyness
profile.fear_zh: 错过重要的机会和连接
profile.desire_zh: 成为一个有影响力的人
profile.lifestyle_zh: 早起型但晚上也不早睡，中间靠咖啡续命
profile.lifestyle_en: Early riser yet still up late, fueled by coffee
profile.rhythm_zh: 全天高能量但下午会短暂崩溃
profile.rhythm_en: High energy all day with a brief afternoon crash
profile.spaces_zh: 建筑系工作室、学生活动中心、各种咖啡厅、操场
profile.spaces_en: Arch studio, student center, various cafes, sports field
profile.long_desire_zh: 拓展人脉同时推进竞赛方案
profile.long_desire_en: Expand network while advancing competition design
profile.short_goal_zh: 约几个跨专业同学聊设计灵感
profile.short_goal_en: Meet a few cross-major friends to swap design inspiration
profile.constraint_zh: 竞赛图纸下周交；手头同时开着三个项目
profile.constraint_en: Competition drawings due next week; three parallel projects
profile.bias_zh: 倾向高估自己的精力上限；把所有社交都看成有价值的
profile.bias_en: Overestimates her stamina; treats all socializing as valuable
profile.narrative_zh: 多认识一个人就多一种可能性
profile.narrative_en: One more person I know is one more possibility
